title: zea mays var. everta
intro: Zea mays var. everta, also known as sweet corn, is a variety of corn that is specifically bred for its sweet and tender kernels. The medicinal properties of sweet corn include its high levels of vitamins A and C, potassium, and fiber, which make it useful in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of sweet corn include lowering cholesterol levels, regulating blood sugar levels, and providing antioxidants that can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Sweet corn is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to support digestive health and overall well-being.
